data.title: Digney Holding Expands to Unite Digney York Associates and EIS Hospitality Under Shared Structure
data.description: Tom Kelley has been appointed as the CEO and President following the integration of EIS Hospitality into Digney York Associates under Digney Holding, Inc. The Delaware-based holding company, Digney Holding, Inc., is the overarching entity overseeing Digney York Associates, LLC. This strategic move was officially announced on April 22, 2026, in Washington.

data.title: SoFi Expands Home Lending to Give Members Greater Access to Home Equity and Support Across Homeownership Journey
data.description: In San Francisco, SoFi Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SOFI), a comprehensive digital financial services provider, revealed the rollout of a fresh Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC) option for its members. This new experience enables users to conveniently tap into their home equity through an entirely digital process integrated directly into the SoFi platform. Additionally, SoFi launched its inaugural Real Estate Advisory Council which includes renowned agents such as Andrew Jevin from Compass and Kourtney Pulitzer.

data.title: Lacey Conway Appointed Senior Vice President at HomeServices of America, Expanding Leadership Role Across National Platform
data.description: Today, HomeServices of America in Minneapolis revealed that Lacey Conway has been appointed as the Senior Vice President. In this role, Conway will collaborate with operating company leaders and their teams to foster growth, strengthen company culture, and enhance value propositions to attract and retain top talent. With experience as the former CEO of Latter & Blum, Conway brings a diverse leadership background to the position. Latter & Blum is recognized as one of the largest independent residential companies in the industry.

data.title: CIM Group, Centennial Yards Company, and The Drew Company Announce Partnership to Bring Award-Winning Virgin Hotel to Downtown Atlanta
data.description: Atlanta-based companies CIM Group, Centennial Yards Company, and Drew Company have revealed plans for Virgin Hotels to establish a presence at the $5 billion, 50-acre Centennial Yards mixed-use development in Downtown Atlanta. Set to open in 2027, the hotel will play a pivotal role in the project's Entertainment District. The initiative is a significant addition to Virgin Hotels' worldwide collection.

data.title: Nexalin Technology Advances Pivotal Clinical Trial of HALO™ Clarity Toward Q2 2026 Enrollment
data.description: A study with 160 participants was conducted to evaluate potential treatment efficacy for moderate-to-severe insomnia. This triple-blinded, sham-controlled study was meticulously designed to meet the requirements for a planned De Novo FDA submission. The study aimed to provide valuable insights into addressing the needs of individuals struggling with this sleep disorder.

data.title: Adial Pharmaceuticals Successfully Completes Manufacturing of Demonstration Batch Production, Enabling Clinical and Registration Production for AD04 Planned Phase 3 Trial
data.description: The initial test batch production has successfully met all required specifications for dissolution, content uniformity, and blend uniformity as per regulatory standards. This accomplishment paves the way for the commencement of clinical drug product production.

data.title: MiCA regulations in Europe burden smaller crypto firms with rising compliance costs, causing concerns about market consolidation.
data.description: In Europe, smaller cryptocurrency firms are encountering escalating compliance expenses as MiCA transitions from a framework to enforcement, sparking concerns about potential market consolidation.

data.title: MSD Lawyers Los Angeles Employment & Personal Injury Firm Hires Mark Russ as Trial Counsel
data.description: MSD Lawyers has recently announced the appointment of Mark Russ as Trial Counsel, further strengthening their Los Angeles Employment and Litigation Practice. The appointment comes with Mark Russ bringing over 30 years of trial experience to the firm. This move is intended to enhance the firm's capabilities in handling legal matters pertaining to employment and litigation in the Los Angeles area.

data.title: Einride and Legato Merger Corp. III Announce Public Filing of Registration Statement on Form F-4
data.description: On April 22, 2026, technology company Einride AB (publ) based in Stockholm and New York announced a partnership with Legato Merger Corp. III, listed on the New York Stock Exchange. Einride is known for advancing cost-efficient electric and autonomous freight solutions for major global shippers. This collaboration aims to further develop sustainable transportation options.

data.title: World Earth Day 2026 Highlights Zero-Carbon Push as CIBF2026 Prepares to Gather Global Battery Industry
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in Shenzhen, China, the 57th World Earth Day is being commemorated with a focus on safeguarding natural resources. This event coincides with the upcoming 18th China International Battery Fair (CIBF2026), known as one of the largest global gatherings in this industry. Both events are highly significant, drawing attention to environmental protection and technological advancements.

data.title: BERNHARD CAPITAL-BACKED DELTA UTILITIES TO EXPAND MISSISSIPPI FOOTPRINT THROUGH ACQUISITION OF SPIRE INC.'S NATURAL GAS BUSINESS
data.description: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana on April 22, 2026, Delta Utilities, a natural gas utility under Bernhard Capital Partners, revealed a new deal with a Spire Inc. subsidiary. The agreement involves the acquisition of Spire's Mississippi local natural gas operations. The details of the transaction and financial terms were not disclosed. As a significant move in the energy sector, this acquisition signifies a strategic expansion for Delta Utilities and Bernhard Capital Partners.

IDF: 'We operated 12 km deep into Lebanon The Sabra Battalion raided the village of Dabin before the ceasefire, 12 km inside Lebanon, targeting a Hezbollah facility prepared for fighting against Israel. More than 20 terrorists were killed in close combat and from the air.'

data.title: Americans Feel Increasingly Alone Despite Craving Connection, New Survey Finds
data.description: A recent survey conducted by Talker Research on behalf of Talkspace revealed that many Americans are expressing a desire for stronger connections in their lives. However, there seems to be a disconnect as individuals are increasingly withdrawing from relationships, leading to feelings of isolation. The survey, which included 2,000 U.S. adults, highlighted a concerning trend known as the 'Disconnection Dilemma'. This phenomenon is characterized by a paradox where the need for community is contradicted by rising instances of individuals choosing to cut off communication or isolate themselves in order to avoid challenging interactions.

data.title: The Weakest Link in OT Security: Tosi Identified It Two Months Before the Federal Advisory
data.description: According to a benchmark study conducted in 2026 by Tosi, it was discovered that vendor remote access emerged as the least secure operational technology (OT) capability in all sectors. On April 7, a federal advisory was released jointly, highlighting this vulnerability as the main target for cyber-attacks on critical infrastructure in the United States. The report did not specify the source but mentioned OULU, Finland, and IRVING.

data.title: smart Debuts Concept #2 and Celebrates World Premiere of #6 EHD at Global Brand Event with "Change of Perspectives"
data.description: In Beijing on April 22, 2026, smart, the innovative premium EV brand, urged the world to adopt a "Change of Perspectives" at the smart Global Brand Event. The event witnessed a significant milestone in the brand's journey with the global unveiling of a new product.

data.title: PepsiCo Deepens AI Capabilities with Google Cloud
data.description: In an announcement made at Cloud Next '26 in Las Vegas on April 22, 2026, PepsiCo (stock symbol: PEP) revealed a new partnership with Google Cloud. This collaboration is set to span multiple years and aims to enhance PepsiCo's digital infrastructure. By utilizing the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, the company intends to streamline processes that enable their teams to transition efficiently from gaining insights to taking strategic actions.
